title: Murder suspect arrested
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Kwanokuthula police arrested a 21-year-old suspect on a murder charge after an incident that occurred in Phase 5, Kwanokuthula, shortly after 19:00 on Saturday 25 October.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Kwanokuthula police arrested a 21-year-old suspect on a murder charge after an incident that occurred in Phase 5, Kwanokuthula, shortly after 19:00 on Saturday 25 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In a statement, Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies said that, according to preliminary reports, police were summoned to the scene after a stabbing incident."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When they arrived at the home, they found a 25-year-old man with a stab wound to his chest. Paramedics declared the man dead on the scene.","html":"When they arrived at the home, they found a 25-year-old man with a stab wound to his chest. Paramedics declared the man dead on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Further investigation led to the arrest of the suspect, said Spies.","html":"Further investigation led to the arrest of the suspect, said Spies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MotiveThe suspect remains in police custody. He will appear in the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate's Court later this week on a charge of murder.","html":"Motive
The suspect remains in police custody. He will appear in the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate's Court later this week on a charge of murder."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spies said the motive for the killing is under investigation.","html":"Spies said the motive for the killing is under investigation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
